auth.loginDescription: Access your wallet and draw history.
auth.loginFailed: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
auth.registerFailed: Failed to register. Please try again.
auth.registerDescription: Start your virtual wallet and try the draw engine.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we will send a reset link.
auth.forgotPasswordSubmitted: If the account exists, a reset message has been sent.
auth.passwordResetDescription: Set a new password for your account.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Password updated. You can sign in with the new password.
auth.passwordResetFailed: Unable to reset the password. Please try again.
auth.verifyEmailDescription: Confirm your email so security and recovery messages reach you.
auth.verificationSuccess: Email verified. You can continue signing in.
auth.verificationFailed: Unable to verify the email. Please try again.
auth.registrationSuccess: Account created. Check your email to verify it.

app.title: User Dashboard
app.verificationGateTitle: Verify your email to unlock the account
app.verificationGateDescription: This account can sign in, but high-risk actions stay blocked until email verification is complete.
app.verificationGateBody: Verify the inbox address on file to continue with draws and other protected actions. We can send a fresh verification link if needed.
app.verificationEmailSent: A new verification email has been sent if the account still needs one.
notes: All debits and credits are written to the ledger.
Draws run inside a single atomic transaction.
Inventory is locked before stock deduction.

hero.title: Transaction-safe prize draws with configurable probability and ledger accuracy.
hero.description: Model wallet-backed draws, dynamic prize pools, and operations visibility inside a full-stack system built for concurrency, audits, and clean service boundaries.

card1.title: Draw Engine Snapshot
card1.description: Balance lock → Weighted pick → Inventory lock → Ledger

card2.title: Operations Control Surface
card2.description: Adjust weights, monitor pool balance, audit draw stats.
card2.body: Live configuration with audit trails. Every change is reflected instantly in the draw engine.

stack.title: Built on a modern stack
stack.description: This portfolio system prioritizes type safety, transactional integrity, and fast iteration.

metrics.label: Domain modules wired

metrics.label: Real payment risk
metrics.detail: Virtual balance only. Perfect for portfolio demos.

features.title: A full-stack reward platform, wired end to end
features.description: Borrowing structure from the landing template, these sections highlight the data consistency, concurrency controls, and operational tooling that make the system portfolio-grade.

rows.title: Wallet + Ledger Integrity
rows.description: Every draw uses atomic balance locks, immutable ledger entries, and clear audit trails for both debits and rewards.

bullets.label: Atomic updates
bullets.copy: Balance and inventory are locked per draw.

rows.title: Dynamic Prize Pool Control
rows.description: Configurable weights, threshold gating, and stock locks prevent overselling while keeping probability updates instant.
